articles.title: The Best Place for Spotting Grail Watches Is Courtside at a Knicks Game
articles.why: Celebrity watch-spotting at playoff games has become a genuine cultural ritual, and when Jay-Z, Chalamet, and Spike Lee are all courtside with grail-level wrists, it captures the intersection of fashion, money, and basketball fandom in one sharp image.
articles.hook: Jay-Z. Chalamet. Spike Lee. / Courtside is the new watch fair.

articles.title: Mortal Kombat II review: More than just camp
articles.why: Mortal Kombat II landing as the best film in the franchise's history — and earning genuine critical respect rather than just camp nostalgia — is a meaningful moment for video game adaptations, which have been on an unprecedented hot streak.
articles.hook: The best Mortal Kombat movie ever made / is actually good.

articles.title: A Political End for an Unusually Political FDA Commissioner
articles.why: The FDA commissioner being attacked from all sides — by anti-vax advocates, pro-life groups, and the scientific establishment simultaneously — is a telling portrait of how impossible it has become to lead a major public health institution in the current political climate.
articles.hook: The FDA chief is getting attacked. / By anti-vaxxers. And pro-lifers. / At the same time.
